scripts.build-advisor-ui: esbuild src/ui/app.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --platform=browser --outfile=tools/content-placement-advisor/app.js --sourcemap && cp placement-map.json tools/content-placement-advisor/placement-map.json && cp content-taxonomies.json tools/content-placement-advisor/content-taxonomies.json
scripts.advisor:refresh: npm run extract-views && npm run scan-crawl -- --crawl-dir "Crawl 2026-03-05" && npm run extract-taxonomies && npm run build-placement-map && npm run build-advisor-ui
scripts.advisor: npm run build-advisor-ui && python3 -m http.server 4173 --bind 127.0.0.1 -d tools/content-placement-advisor
scripts.advisor:start: npm run advisor:refresh && python3 -m http.server 4173 --bind 127.0.0.1 -d tools/content-placement-advisor
